item.title: SPIKE: libgit2 Swift Bindings for iOS
item.intent: Evaluate libgit2 Swift bindings for git operations on iOS — clone, commit, push — to validate the GitHub storage approach
item.description: Evaluate SwiftGit2 or similar libgit2 Swift wrapper for iOS. Build a prototype that clones a GitHub repo, modifies a file, commits, and pushes. Measure: binary size impact, clone performance on Wi-Fi and cellular, commit+push latency, and SPM build compatibility. Verify App Store compliance (libgit2 is used by Working Copy and other shipped apps). Assess OAuth device flow for GitHub auth. Blocks FEAT-070, FEAT-071, FEAT-072 (GitHub Storage). Updates architecture decision [A-064].
acceptanceCriteria: Prototype clones a GitHub repo, modifies a file, commits, and pushes successfully
Binary size impact of libgit2 measured
Clone and push performance measured on Wi-Fi and cellular
GitHub OAuth device flow prototyped and working
Architecture decision [A-064] updated based on findings
